ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the resource */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., Online, Deleted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource's image */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource's file */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, author, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the resource */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given to the resource (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, comment) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., logged in, edited resource) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token used for session identification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date when the session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the notification is intended */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, author, admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., edit, delete, view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the resource */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating of the resource */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
